title: Di Ba
synopsis: Over the years, countless powerful cultivators have come and gone. But the world never realized that behind every powerful cultivator, there seemed to be a mysterious... Dark Crow. After the Dark Crow guided a legion of young cultivators to the peak of cultivation and established their own sects, he chose to leave the world behind. Thousands of years have passed since his departure, and the once mighty sects have become weak and in danger of failing. Finally the Dark Crow returned in the form of a young man, here to fulfill his promise to defend the sects. (Source: Tencent, translated)

title: Tenchi Muyou! Ryououki: Heianmuyo! Picture Drama
titleRomaji: Tenchi Muyou! Ryououki: Heianmuyo! Picture Drama
titleNative: 天地無用! 魎皇鬼 謹製びでお絵本 平安無用!
synopsis: A standalone Tenchi Muyou Ryououki picture drama released as a part of PAC on VHS and seemingly around the same time on laser disc. The premise of Tenchi Muyou! Ryououki: Heian Muyo! has Aeka, Yosho (in his Katsuhito form), Tenchi, Mihoshi, Ryou-Ouki, and Ryouko in the Heian era (794 AD to 1185) of Japan. Tenchi and Mihoshi are samurai partners on their way to slay a demon, while Aeka longs for Tenchi's return.

It is snowing in midwinter, after school at a certain school. (Source: YouTube, translated)

title: Isewan Taifuu Monogatari
synopsis: "On September 26, 1959, Super Typhoon #15 (also known as "T5915", "Vera", or "Isewan Typhoon"), struck the coast of Japan with the maximum wind speed of 305 km/h, causing over 5,000 dead or missing plus over 30,000 injured, the heaviest casualty caused by a single typhoon in Japan in 20th century. This animated movie was produced on the 30th anniversary of the tragedy in order to commemorate the dead and survivors."

title: Ever Night
synopsis: The protagonist Ning Que travels to a seemingly real Tang Dynasty world, only to find that it is a dangerous world of cultivation. He originally thought that he could live a life of luxury and become superior, but he finds that he had no talent for cultivation. Additionally, he witnessed the massacre of his entire family at the age of four and was hunted for thousands of miles. While escaping death, he picked up a black umbrella in a sea of ​​blood and corpses and found the infant Sangsang. In despair, he found the motivation to live. Unwilling to bow to fate, he takes the big black umbrella and Sangsang, and begins a thrilling counterattack. (Source: bilibili, translated)

title: First Line
synopsis: Young animator Mito feels trapped between the demands of a difficult sequence, a tight deadline, debilitating self-doubt, and a seemingly deranged director. Sometimes the only way to get to the other side is to charge right through. (Source: Fantasia International Film Festival) Note: Originally released on June 28, 2024 as a part of "Gemnibus Vol. 1" anthology, however was also simultaneously selected to screen, and then later premiered at Fantasia International Film Festival.
